title: 生命科学与数码革命（双语）
description: 见过在天上边滑翔边讲课的老师吗？见过在海里边划艇边讲课的老师吗？本课程由国家精品开放在线课程团队投入巨资制作完成，动画视频课时超过50%，深入医院、药厂、养殖场、大数据中心、高校实验室等实景拍摄20余处，受邀讲解专家30余人。带你进入生命与数码信息的王国，全网无同类课程。你还犹豫什么？Have you ever seen a teacher who glides in the sky and lectures, who teaches while canoeing in the ocean?This course is produced by the MOOC team at the national level with huge investment, with >50% of the animation video, in-depth shooting in hospitals, pharmaceutical factories, farms, big data centers, university labs, and other 20 places, and >30 experts invited. We will take you into the kingdom of life and digital information, and there are no similar courses on the whole network. Don't hesitate to join us!

instructors.name: 张晗星;权太勇;张爱军;魏天迪;刘毅;宁斌;孙路平;康翠洁;巩晶;赵方庆
